name: week-md-reconcile
goal: Auto-skip action items during meeting processing that match completed tasks in now/week.md or now/scratchpad.md, reducing manual work for PMs who batch-process meetings.

userStories.title: Add completed items extraction utility
userStories.description: Add `getCompletedItems(content: string): string[]` function to packages/core/src/utils/agenda.ts that extracts completed checkbox text from markdown. Mirrors existing `getUncheckedAgendaItems()` pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: `getCompletedItems()` returns array of completed task text from markdown checkboxes
Handles indented checkboxes (`  - [x]`) and uppercase X (`- [X]`)
Unit test in `agenda.test.ts` covers: basic checkbox, indented checkbox, uppercase X, mixed content

userStories.title: Extend meeting processing with reconciliation
userStories.description: Extend processMeetingExtraction() in packages/core/src/services/meeting-processing.ts to match action items against completed items and mark them as skipped. Add 'skipped' to ItemStatus, 'reconciled' to ItemSource, completedItems and reconcileJaccard to ProcessingOptions, and stagedItemMatchedText to ProcessedMeetingResult.
acceptanceCriteria: Action items matching completed tasks get `status: 'skipped'`, `source: 'reconciled'`
Matched text stored, truncated to 60 chars with '...' suffix
Decisions and learnings are NOT checked (verify in test)
Unit tests added for: basic match, no match, truncation, decisions unaffected

userStories.title: Integrate in CLI meeting extract
userStories.description: Update the `extract --stage` command in packages/cli/src/commands/meeting.ts to read completed items from workspace (now/week.md and now/scratchpad.md) and pass to processMeetingExtraction(). Update output formatting for reconciled items and JSON output structure.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads both `week.md` and `scratchpad.md` (graceful if missing ‚Äî empty string)
Running extract shows '‚úì Already done (matched: X)' for reconciled items
Items display in staged sections with skipped status
JSON output includes `reconciled` array: `[{ id, matchedText }]`

userStories.title: Add comprehensive tests
userStories.description: Add tests in packages/core/test/utils/agenda.test.ts, packages/core/test/services/meeting-processing.test.ts, and packages/cli/test/commands/meeting-extract.test.ts covering the new functionality.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit test: `getCompletedItems()` parses checkboxes correctly (5+ cases)
Unit test: `processMeetingExtraction()` skips matching action items
Unit test: matchedText populated and truncated correctly
Unit test: Decisions and learnings NOT affected by completedItems
CLI test: extract with mocked week.md shows reconciled items (if test file exists)
